summary: Iteration 6 testing complete. All 5 major features verified: 1) Security hardening with bcrypt password hashing and JWT_SECRET from env (no fallback), 2) SSO placeholder button shows 'coming soon' toast, 3) Session Complete endpoint works (PUT /api/sessions/{id}/complete), 4) Coach card banner height reduced to 48px, 5) Full Admin Dashboard with real API data - stats, coaches, coachees, trends, and drill-down user history modal all working.
critical_code_review_comments: Security: bcrypt password hashing implemented correctly in routes/auth.py
Security: JWT_SECRET required from env with RuntimeError if missing - no hardcoded fallback
SSO: Placeholder button uses toast.info() for 'coming soon' message
Session Complete: PUT /api/sessions/{id}/complete endpoint properly updates session status
Coach Card: .coach-banner CSS class has height: 48px (reduced from 80px)
Admin Dashboard: All 5 admin API endpoints working with proper 403 for non-admins
Admin Dashboard: Stats show real metrics (6 coaches, 2 coachees, 6 sessions, 5 avg rating)
Admin Dashboard: Charts & Trends tab has 4 charts (Coach Utilization, Request Trends, Sessions Over Time, Expertise Distribution)
Admin Dashboard: Coaches tab lists all 6 coaches with feedback_rating, session_count, active_coachees
Admin Dashboard: Coachees tab lists all 2 coachees with session_count, journey_count, active_journey_status
Admin Dashboard: Drill-down modal shows full user history (sessions, journeys, feedback)
seed_data_creation: Database has 6 coaches, 2 coachees, 6 completed sessions (Sarah with Gaurav), 1 feedback entry (5/5 rating)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 6 features tested and working: 1) Security: bcrypt hashing works - correct password returns 200, wrong password returns 401. JWT_SECRET required from env. 2) SSO: Button on login page shows 'Organisation SSO login (Outlook) coming soon.' toast. 3) Session Complete: PUT /api/sessions/{id}/complete works (tested via API). 4) Coach Card: Banner height is 48px (verified via CSS and browser). 5) Admin Dashboard: Full analytics with real data - 9 stat cards, 3 tabs (Charts & Trends, Coaches, Coachees), drill-down modal for user history. Top Performing Coaches section shows Gaurav Jain with 5/5 rating.
